title: Horror Pacing Prism Output v1
description: Derived pacing indices computed from invariants + metrics + BciSummary + CSI. Used by H.Director/H.Selector for beat scheduling and intensity gating.

pressure.description: Weighted combination of DET, UEC, and BCI stressScore. Higher = more intense pacing pressure.

noveltyBudget.description: Remaining capacity for new horror content. Recharges when pressure is low, depletes when high.

escalationGate.description: Scalar gate [0,1] for escalation decisions. 0 = block major beats; 1 = allow full escalation.
